siteMetadata.title: 瑶ノ子 - YokoTamanoko.com
siteMetadata.subtitle: I produce my art by the beautiful scene that comes to my mind.

frontmatter.title: Hydrangeas in a Sacred Mountain
frontmatter.description: I saw a lot of beautiful hydrangeas in the sacred place Mt.Yoshino. Every clusters were so big and filled with energy. I felt this was reality. My eyes opened. I’d like to keep it in my mind.
